Coordinated with Weaver Jewell P Trust lease to same lessee. ISSUE-43 item 20 PULLED.

operations.content: 7. `2012-08-08_[334]_f` — Trust No. 1 AND Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee) → Polomsky Hughes & Associates, L.L.C. (memorandum of oil and gas lease, Freestone) — **734.99 acres total** across 8 tracts: **Tract One** 317.50 ac Wm. Ritchie Survey A-527 + Jas. M. Davis Survey A-202 (source: Distribution Deed dated 7/7/2005, Vol. 1327 Pg. 561 = deed [16]/[37] — Trust No. 2 property); **Tract Two** 200.00 ac J. Strickland Survey A-550 (source: C.C. Ballard et ux→J.M. Bounds 11/7/1908 Vol.31 p.182 FC); **Tract Three** 53.33 ac B. Slaughter Survey A-565 (source: Mrs. Martha Camron→J.M. Bounds 12/5/1912 Vol.47 p.118 FC — ⚠️ name variant: "Camron" vs "Cameron" in [322]/[332]); **Tract Four** 53.00 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: S.T. Bounds et ux→J.M. Bounds 5/18/1883 Vol.37 p.463 FC — first tract); **Tract Five** 53.33 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: N. Lansford et ux Savanah Lansford→Jessie M. Bounds 8/20/1890 Vol.2 p.406 FC); **Tract Six** 4.50 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: S.T. Bounds et ux→J.M. Bounds 5/18/1883 Vol.37 p.463 FC — third tract); **Tract Seven** 40.00 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: I.M. Thompson et ux→J.M. Bounds 9/21/1885 Vol.2 p.410 FC); **Tract Eight** 13.33 ac B. Slaughter A-565 (source: I.M. Thompson et ux→J.M. Bounds 3/13/1886 Vol.2 p.408 FC). **Tracts Two–Eight (417.49 ac) = [322]/[332] Exhibit A Tracts 1–7; NO W. Curry A-9 tracts included.** Tract One adds 317.50 ac not in any prior lease ([322]/[332] covered only the 491.99-ac Exhibit A). ⚠️ **FC index error**: Index identified Trust No. 2 only and survey "W RITCHIE SUR" — BOTH trusts are lessors and lease covers Strickland/Slaughter surveys in addition to Ritchie/Davis. ⚠️ **Trust name defect in granting clause**: reads "John Pierce Black and Olena Bounds Estate Trust No. 1" and "...Trust No. 2" — omits "Black" after "Bounds" in both trust names; acknowledgment on page 2 correctly uses "John Pierce Black and Olena Bounds Black Estate Trust No. 1 & No. 2." Primary term: 3 years with option to extend 2 years, so long thereafter as oil and gas is produced. Subordination clause: all post-Aug 8, 2012 encumbrances subordinate to lease terms. **Memorandum only** — underlying lease not of record; memorandum places constructive notice. Coordinated with Weaver Jewell P Family Testamentary Trust lease to same lessee on same filing date (FC Doc# 2012-1204330, OR/1588/165). Lessor address: 5408 Point Wood Circle, Waco TX 76710. Lessee address: 102 North College Avenue, Suite 616, Tyler TX 75702. Name variants from source deed citations: "Martha Camron" (Tract 3, vs "Cameron" in [322]/[332]); "N. Lansford" + "Jessie M. Bounds" (Tract 5, consistent with [332]; cf. "N. Lunsford" + "J.M. Bounds" in [322]). No "S. Slaughter" error — all six B. Slaughter references use correct initial (cf. ISSUE-27 re [322]). **Executive rights context**: Trust No. 1 holds executive rights over the [14] Tract One parcels per deed [17]/[38]; Trust No. 2 holds executive rights over the [16] Richie League and [20]/[39] parcels; Beard as Sole Trustee of both trusts exercised both sets of executive rights in this single lease — same pattern as deed [332] (XTO lease). Acknowledged Aug 8, 2012, Freestone County, before Christopher Brent Maertins NP (exp. Dec 8, 2013). Filed Sep 27, 2012 at 04:28 PM; Linda Jarvis, County Clerk, Freestone County; Deputy: Levi Whiteside. Fee: $20.00; Receipt: 116162. FC Doc# 01204190; OR Vol. 1587, Pg. 893 (2 pages). ISSUE-43 item 20. Phase 5
